tweets.text: RT @milesjennings: More lies. Currently, there are NO ethics guardrails on crypto. CLARITY puts new guardrails in place. @SenWarren knows that, but she'll continue to lie about what CLARITY does because she doesn't want it to pass. It's as simple as that.
tweets.summary: Crypto lawyer defends CLARITY Act ethics guardrails against Sen. Warren's criticism, calling current crypto ethics rules absent.

tweets.text: RT @SenatorHagerty: America is primed for digital asset leadership. The GENIUS Act has already helped unlock investment and innovation in the stablecoin sector. Now, we have an opportunity to strengthen America’s leadership in digital assets, but only if we pass the CLARITY Act. The time is now, let’s get it done. 🇺🇸
tweets.summary: Sen. Hagerty urges passage of CLARITY Act to build on GENIUS Act's stablecoin gains and cement US digital asset leadership.

tweets.text: No rule can give the CFTC spot authority over digital assets, grant new sanctions authority against adversaries, or protect developers from unwarranted prosecution. Only Congress can. The Clarity Act is the only path that works.
tweets.summary: Sen. Lummis argues only Congress via the Clarity Act can grant CFTC spot authority over digital assets and protect developers.

tweets.text: RT @_jikim: Significant. @FLEOAORG expressing support for CLARITY and confirming what many of us know--this bill is strong on consumer protection and law enforcement. The time is now to pass CLARITY to ensure the U.S. has these strong guardrails in place.
tweets.summary: Law enforcement group FLEOA endorses CLARITY Act, citing strong consumer protection and enforcement provisions.

tweets.text: 1/ At its core, the Clarity Act is a consumer protection bill. It would establish clear federal rules designed to protect consumers engaging with digital assets. Here's how it would strengthen consumer protections across the digital asset ecosystem: 🧵
tweets.summary: Blockchain Association thread argues the CLARITY Act would establish federal consumer protection rules for digital assets.

tweets.text: RT @SummerMersinger: Thank you, @FLEOAORG, for engaging on this critical issue and recognizing that the Clarity Act can bring digital asset activity into a clear regulatory framework while preserving the authorities law enforcement needs to pursue illicit actors.
tweets.summary: Industry group thanks law enforcement org FLEOA for backing the CLARITY Act's digital asset regulatory framework.

tweets.text: Federal law enforcement doesn't just casually hand out this kind of support. They do it because they know CLARITY will make Americans safer. Thank you @FLEOAORG.
tweets.summary: Lawyer highlights federal law enforcement's rare endorsement of the CLARITY Act digital asset bill.

tweets.text: Looking forward to joining @NathanBomey at @axios Live at 8:35am tomorrow, where we’ll discuss prediction markets, crypto, and the latest innovations on the new frontier of finance. Tune in here👇🔗 https://t.co/1CNB2we5H8
tweets.summary: CFTC Chairman Selig to discuss prediction markets and crypto regulation in Axios Live interview.

tweets.text: America is primed for digital asset leadership. The GENIUS Act has already helped unlock investment and innovation in the stablecoin sector. Now, we have an opportunity to strengthen America’s leadership in digital assets, but only if we pass the CLARITY Act. The time is now, let’s get it done. 🇺🇸
tweets.summary: Senator Hagerty urges passing the CLARITY Act to build on GENIUS Act stablecoin momentum for US digital asset leadership.

tweets.text: GENIUS proved Congress can deliver on crypto. Now the Senate has until the August recess to do it again. The Clarity Act passed the committee with bipartisan support. The framework is ready. The only thing left is a floor vote.
tweets.summary: Senate urged to pass Clarity Act by August recess after bipartisan committee approval, following GENIUS Act precedent.
